name: Check Cashing
description_short: ACE Cash Express provides check cashing, money orders, bill payment, and money transfers at retail locations. No bank account required—only a valid government-issued ID.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is a financial services retailer operating multiple locations across the United States, including a downtown Baltimore location on W Baltimore St. The company specializes in alternative financial services for consumers who may lack traditional bank accounts or need access to cash-based money services. ACE has partnered with Pathward, N.A. (Member FDIC) to offer banking products alongside their core check-cashing business.

The Baltimore location offers a comprehensive suite of money services: check cashing for personal, tax refund, and business checks; MoneyGram money transfers to over 200 countries; money orders; bill payment for rent, utilities, and credit cards; and ATM services. They also offer prepaid debit card products (ACE Elite Visa Card), mobile banking accounts (Porte), and online checking accounts (Flare Account). Extended hours—8 AM to 6 PM weekdays, 8 AM to 7 PM Friday, and 8 AM to 5 PM Saturday—provide access beyond typical bank hours.

ACE distinguishes itself through accessibility: no bank account requirement for check cashing, same-day cash availability for various check types including large business checks, and extended operating hours compared to traditional banks. Their business services explicitly welcome business check cashing with documentation verification. The company emphasizes convenience and cash availability as competitive advantages.

ACE Cash Express operates as a traditional check-cashing and money services retailer. While they partner with FDIC-insured banking institutions for deposit accounts, the core business model relies on transaction-based fees for check cashing and money services. Consumers should note that specific fee structures are not disclosed on this location page, and fees may apply to most services. The service is most suitable for unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate cash access.
pros: No bank account required—only valid government ID needed to cash checks
Extended hours: Open until 7 PM Friday and 8 AM Saturday (beyond typical bank hours)
Cashes all check types: personal, tax refund, business, and large amounts with cash on hand
MoneyGram money transfers available to 200+ countries and territories
FDIC-insured banking products available through partnership with Pathward, N.A.
Bill payment services in-store and online for rent, utilities, and credit cards
Business services with competitive fees and proof-of-authority documentation support
cons: Check cashing fees not disclosed on website—consumers must contact store or visit in-person for pricing
Money services are transaction-based and likely carry per-service fees (typical for check cashers)
Sunday hours not available—location closed on Sundays, limiting weekend access
Core business model dependent on fees; cost may be higher than traditional banks for frequent users
Limited transparency about fee structures compared to banks
best_for: Unbanked consumers without a bank account who need immediate check cashing
Business owners needing same-day business check cashing with cash on hand
Workers receiving tax refund checks and needing immediate cash conversion
International money transfer senders using MoneyGram services
diagnosis: Best for unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing without a bank account, business owners requiring same-day check processing, and those needing international money transfers. Primary caveat: specific fee structures are not transparent on the website; fees apply to most services and should be verified before use, particularly for frequent transactions where a traditional bank account may be more economical.
services: Check cashing (personal, payroll, tax refund, business checks)
MoneyGram money transfers (domestic and international to 200+ countries)
Bill payment services (in-store and online for rent, utilities, credit cards)
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
Card loading services (debit and prepaid card funding)
